items.title: Maybe, but I thought that with Pacome Dadiet two years ago and Mo Diawara last year, and they're both on the roster.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: Maybe, but I thought that with Pacome Dadiet two years ago and Mo Diawara last year, and they're both on the roster.

items.title: "mikal bridges wore a pacome dadiet jersey to the knicks' championship parade" is a sentence steeped in so many layers of "wait is this real life?" my brain can't handle thinking about it for too long
items.author: dan favale
items.body_excerpt: "mikal bridges wore a pacome dadiet jersey to the knicks' championship parade" is a sentence steeped in so many layers of "wait is this real life?" my brain can't handle thinking about it for too long

items.title: Mikal Bridges is wearing a backwards Pacome Dadiet jersey like he's in a 2003 Fabolous video.
items.author: Jared Dubin
